name: analytics-office
description: A discipline harness for AI-assisted analytics: a bench of expert BI skills, each read-only and writing to one living knowledge base you resume from. Skills: groundwork (orientation), requirements-interrogator (requirements), kpi-contract (metric definitions), model-contract (dimensional model design), audit-my-assumptions (assumption pre-flight), audit-my-experiment (experiment validity), audit-my-forecast (forecast/time-series validity), review-my-query (query review), triage-my-number (diagnosis), kb-reconcile (knowledge-base audit), brief-my-findings (findings brief & stakeholder updates), defend-my-number (meeting prep & defensibility), status-truth (provenance-graded status reports), explore-my-data (harnessed exploration), map-my-estate (provenance-graded ER/lineage maps), change-impact (pre-flight blast radius), review-my-dashboard (the assembly review).

plugins.name: analytics-office
plugins.description: A discipline harness for AI-assisted analytics, a bench of skills that grows by accretion — each read-only, all writing to one living knowledge base you (or the next agent) resume from. Skills:'groundwork' (orient on an inherited estate and build a living knowledge base), 'requirements-interrogator' (drive a solution-shaped request to the real decision before building), 'kpi-contract' (pin a metric's exact definition and lock it as a versioned contract), 'defend-my-number' (rehearse defending a number against a skeptic before the meeting), 'review-my-query' (review the query or model behind a number against its locked definition, read-only), 'brief-my-findings' (compose a findings brief or stakeholder update with every claim sourced and graded and open questions kept open, read-only), 'triage-my-number' (diagnose why a number is wrong or moved unexpectedly across the whole failure surface before explaining it, read-only), 'model-contract' (design the dimensional model before it is built: declare the grain, gate the source grain, and surface every structural fork for the owner to pin, read-only), 'kb-reconcile' (audit the accreted knowledge base against its sources and itself before its conclusions are used, flagging drift, contradictions, and unsourced numbers, read-only), 'audit-my-experiment' (validate an experiment / A-B result before it drives a decision: switches to audit-mode and computes the validity checks a consumption read eyeballs past — SRM, peeking, multiplicity, power — gating the rollout, read-only), and 'audit-my-assumptions' (surface and falsify the silent assumptions inherited from a source — proc, query, export — before building on OR reporting from them, so a stale or wrong premise doesn't cascade into a plausible wrong output, read-only), and 'audit-my-forecast' (audit a forecast / time-series projection before it drives a plan: switches to audit-mode and checks leakage, backtest validity, interval honesty, and drift — computing coverage and skill-vs-naive from the actuals-vs-predicted in hand — gating the plan, read-only), and 'status-truth' (compose the status report from the record so the truth survives the pull to look green: provenance-graded ledger, honest RAG with the watermelon test, expired verdicts routed to re-audit, read-only), and 'explore-my-data' (harness open-ended exploration: pre-register before looking, count every cut, magnitude and base before significance, found-vs-confirmed via pre-specified hold-outs, read-only), and 'map-my-estate' (draw the estate as a picture that can be trusted: ER and lineage views where every edge cites its evidence, unsupported edges render dashed, islands stay islands, read-only), and 'change-impact' (the graded blast radius before a change ships: evidence-walked transitive impact, silent meaning-drift ranked above loud breakage, unmapped consumers stay UNKNOWN, read-only), and 'review-my-dashboard' (review the assembled surface before it ships: additivity per measure, default-filter population claims, the title test, staleness — graded against the locked contracts, read-only).
